name: Payments
description: Stripe checkout, webhook processing, KUSD minting

apiEndpoints.name: Stripe Checkout Session
apiEndpoints.description: Creates a Stripe checkout session for consultation payment. Returns session URL for redirect.

serverFlow.description: Initialize Stripe SDK with STRIPE_SECRET_KEY, API version 2025-04-30.basil
Parse { amount, doctorName } from request JSON body
stripe.checkout.sessions.create() — mode: payment, single line item: 'Consultation with {doctorName}', price: amount*100 cents USD
Set success_url: /book?payment=success&amount&doctor, cancel_url: /book?payment=cancelled. Metadata: { doctorName, amount }

errorResponses.description: Stripe SDK error or missing STRIPE_SECRET_KEY

apiEndpoints.name: Stripe Webhook Handler
apiEndpoints.description: Verifies Stripe webhook signature and triggers KUSD mint on checkout.session.completed

requestBody.raw: string (Stripe event payload, read as raw text for signature verification)

serverFlow.description: Read raw request body as text (required for signature verification)
If stripe-signature header + STRIPE_WEBHOOK_SECRET present: stripe.webhooks.constructEvent(). Otherwise: JSON.parse fallback (dev mode)
